---
title: Extirpation Risk
shortTitle: Extirpation Risk
weight: 5
knit: (function(input, ...) { source(here::here("R/knit_render.R"), local = TRUE)$value(input, ...) })
---

## Extirpation Risk

[Simon et al., 2025](https://nph.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/ppp3.70130)

|   |   |
|---|---|
|PP = Solow probability of presence| Baseline year = 1897|
|EP = Solow probability of extirpation (1 - PP) | Analysis year = 2024|

```{=html}
<br>
<svg width="100%" viewBox="0 0 1700 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif">
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1700" height="300" fill="#0c2c36"/>

  <g fill="#4e7389">
    <circle cx="140" cy="110" r="42"/>
    <circle cx="480" cy="110" r="42"/>
    <circle cx="820" cy="110" r="42"/>
    <circle cx="1160" cy="110" r="42"/>
    <circle cx="1500" cy="110" r="42"/>
  </g>

  <g fill="#ffffff" font-size="40" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">
    <text x="140" y="112">1</text>
    <text x="480" y="112">2</text>
    <text x="820" y="112">3</text>
    <text x="1160" y="112">4</text>
    <text x="1500" y="112">5</text>
  </g>

  <g stroke="#5d7e93" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none">
    <line x1="204" y1="110" x2="410" y2="110"/>
    <path d="M394 90 L416 110 L394 130"/>
    <line x1="544" y1="110" x2="750" y2="110"/>
    <path d="M734 90 L756 110 L734 130"/>
    <line x1="884" y1="110" x2="1090" y2="110"/>
    <path d="M1074 90 L1096 110 L1074 130"/>
    <line x1="1224" y1="110" x2="1430" y2="110"/>
    <path d="M1414 90 L1436 110 L1414 130"/>
  </g>

  <g fill="#ffffff" font-size="33" text-anchor="middle">
    <text x="140" y="200">Filter taxa</text>
    <text x="480" y="200">Explore the table</text>
    <text x="820" y="200">Select a taxon</text>
    <text x="820" y="238">from the table</text>
    <text x="1160" y="200">Define the population</text>
    <text x="1160" y="238">radius</text>
    <text x="1500" y="200">Explore</text>
    <text x="1500" y="238">population-specific</text>
    <text x="1500" y="276">EP on map</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```
